specific_question: In 2024, how many non-battery production assets did Olivia Martinez’s team audit for asset utilization at Elexion Automotive?
answer: According to internal Elexion Automotive audit reports, Olivia Martinez’s team completed utilization audits for 11 non-battery production assets across Elexion's North American facilities between January 1 and December 31, 2024.
dr_question: By Q2 2026, how can Elexion Automotive leverage the integration of digital engineering methodologies with digital twins to optimize EV battery performance and lifecycle management, while ensuring regulatory compliance across North American markets?
